generated_oml:
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with permanent magnet synchronous motor, gear transmission, cycloidal gearbox, max working range [-90°, 90°], max speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driven by current input for the first axis of the robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in the robot's first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the robot's first axis"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control execution"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor for measuring angular position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox for measuring angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring motor current for the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) data from current sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) data measured by motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) data derived from motor current measurements and friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor position output (r_M) from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, MotorCurrentData
]

instance SimulatedGearboxOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox output position (r_G) from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderData, MotorCurrentData
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output (r_out) from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, GearboxEncoderData, MotorCurrentData
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb and Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AAS_AssetDescription : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for standardized asset description of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling using BDD and IBD"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction models including Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized asset description"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for real-time data streaming of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time data comparison and friction model visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models and data comparison in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction for enhancing robot motion accuracy through model-based control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight, ControlAlgorithmAdjustment
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data comparison used to optimize robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization of robot control algorithms based on friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionModelVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models and data comparison"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gears, sensors), data streaming via MQTT, SysML and Simulink models for behavior simulation, AAS for contextual asset metadata, and dashboard for unified visualization of friction models and real-time data."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase of the robot's lifecycle, focusing on operational data during real-time robot operation for continuous friction model improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference values to assess friction model accuracy, with deviation analysis for static, kinetic, and viscous friction components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for asset description and SysML for modeling consistency."
]
